meaning: Wide Area Telephone (或 Telecommunications) Service(美国电话电报公司对工商业用户按月固定收费的)大地区长途电话服务
examples: Some people still think WATS calls are free.
Old spirit houses are often left by sacred trees or at wats.
Thailand has over 26,000 Wats or temples. This tour brings you to the 3 most distinguished temples in Bangkok.
The sad fact is that state regulators cannot hope to police adequately white-collar crimes that are perpetrated through WATS lines and computers.
